scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.functions.json
scripts.test:regressions: vite-node scripts/regressions.test.ts && vite-node scripts/data-api.test.ts && vite-node scripts/auth-api.test.ts && vite-node scripts/main-sync.test.ts && vite-node scripts/api-client.test.ts && vite-node scripts/main-state-persistence.test.ts && vite-node scripts/app-state-chunks.test.ts && vite-node scripts/main-state-performance.test.ts && vite-node scripts/main-owner-identity.test.ts && vite-node scripts/user-request-regressions.test.ts && vite-node scripts/plan-history-retention.test.ts && vite-node scripts/main-state-entity-merge.test.ts && vite-node scripts/main-state-subject-integrity.test.ts && vite-node scripts/main-state-manual-progress-integrity.test.ts && vite-node scripts/main-state-writer-lease.test.ts && vite-node scripts/schema-compatibility.test.ts && vite-node scripts/shell-navigation.test.ts && vite-node scripts/auth-loading-state.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: vite-node scripts/memory-domain.test.ts && vite-node scripts/memory-session.test.ts && vite-node scripts/memory-import.test.ts && vite-node scripts/memory-application.test.ts && vite-node scripts/memory-selected-set.test.ts && vite-node scripts/memory-selectors.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:api: node scripts/memory-api.mjs && node scripts/main-state-api.mjs && node scripts/auth-rate-limit-api.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:browser && npm run test:integration:api
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:regressions && npm run test:scheduler && npm run test:shadow
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && node scripts/bundle-budget.mjs
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.d1:schema: wrangler d1 execute studycommander-db --remote --file=./schema/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute studycommander-db --remote --file=./schema/main-state-chunks.sql && wrangler d1 execute studycommander-db --remote --file=./schema/auth-rate-limits.sql
scripts.d1:schema:local: wrangler d1 execute studycommander-db --local --file=./schema/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute studycommander-db --local --file=./schema/main-state-chunks.sql && wrangler d1 execute studycommander-db --local --file=./schema/auth-rate-limits.sql
